message:
feat(fwc): add prerequisite onboarding and mesh targeting modules (+318 tests)

- Add prerequisite.rs (167 tests): prerequisite descriptor schema, ready-state
  doctor, guided onboarding workflows, drift detection with severity scoring,
  repair planning with dry-run support, and verification matrix
- Add mesh_targeting.rs (151 tests): mesh context resolution, execution target
  selection, placement explanation with alternatives, rollout cohorts with
  canary/rolling/blue-green/all-at-once strategies, convergence reporting,
  offline availability checking, and mirror verification

Total fwc: 15,578 tests (14,394 unit + 1,147 lib + 28 integration + 9 fixtures)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
